description: Control Elgato Stream Deck devices (set button images, colors, brightness, handle presses) via the `streamdeck` Rust CLI. The CLI talks to a daemon that owns the USB HID hardware directly — no Elgato app needed. Use this skill whenever the user wants to set a Stream Deck button, display status on a Stream Deck, configure Stream Deck keys, change brightness, react to button presses, or show dynamic indicators (CI status, deploy state, etc.) on physical buttons. Also trigger when the user mentions Stream Deck in the context of developer tooling, notifications, dashboards, or hardware buttons.
